---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new check, adapter, or vertical pack
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you want fewwords to do?

A short description of the feature.

## What problem does it solve?

What real production failure mode would this catch? If you have a real trace that exposed it, that's gold, paste a sanitized version.

## What category of work?

- [ ] New trace adapter (your format isn't auto-detected)
- [ ] New contract primitive (a rule that doesn't fit existing primitives)
- [ ] New vertical contract pack
- [ ] CLI / DX improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Are you willing to implement it?

- [ ] Yes, I can write a PR
- [ ] No, just suggesting

(Either is fine, the maintainer triages from highest-leverage first.)
